title: Triunia youngiana
taxonomy: Triunia youngiana is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. It is native to Australia, specifically in the state of New South Wales. The plant is classified as a part of the order Oxalidales and the subclass Rosidae. The family Cunoniaceae is a group of woody plants native to Australia and New Zealand. The classification of Triunia youngiana is still being studied by botanists.
